title: Refresh rune and item assumptions before blaming execution
body: Patch 26.9 changes enough rune and item foundations that some old build assumptions are stale. Deathfire Touch supports sustained damage casters, Stormraider's Surge replaces the mobility-keystone space left by Phase Rush, Hail of Blades changes shape, and several items were added, removed, or reworked.
actionables: Before calling a build mistake, check whether the champion's old keystone or core item was changed or removed in 26.9.
For repeated losses, compare whether the player is still using a pre-26.9 rune/item identity on a champion whose supported pattern changed.
Separate mechanical failure from outdated setup: if the rune/item page no longer matches the champion's best fight pattern, fix setup first.

source.title: League of Legends Patch 26.9 Notes
source.notes: Derived from the Runes and Items sections in Patch 26.9.
